narration: Here's what science actually says about correlation vs causation.

narration: Just because two things happen together doesn't mean one causes the other.
visual_description: Context visual: Just because two things happen together doesn't mean one causes the other.

narration: Take ice cream sales and shark attacks. They both spike in summer. But do they cause each other?

narration: Researchers note that correlation merely highlights relationships, not causation. Random factors could be at play.
